Product: Odoo
*Activities* are follow-up tasks tied to a record in an Odoo database.

Title: Schedule activities
*Activities* are follow-up tasks tied to a record in an Odoo database.
Enter a title for the activity in the Summary field, located in the Schedule Activity pop-up window.
Select a name from the Assigned to drop-down menu to assign the activity to a different user.
Add any additional information in the optional Log a note... field.
The Due Date field on the Schedule Activity pop-up window auto-populates based on the configuration settings for the selected Activity Type.
For example, to view and edit the activities available for the *CRM* application, go to CRM app --> Configuration --> Activity Types.
Scheduled activities are added to the chatter for the record under Planned activities
After completing an activity, click Mark Done under the activity entry in the chatter. This opens a Mark Done pop-up window
